ddls:
CREATE TABLE "officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city official */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the city official */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department ID that the official belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the official */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the official */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the official */,
  "address" TEXT /* Office address of the official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officials_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the official engaging in the activity */,
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity type */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the activity started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the activity ended */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or details about the activity */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome or result of the activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the activity took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_activity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each city official
Full name of the city official
Department ID that the official belongs to
Contact email for inquiries about the department
Contact phone number for inquiries about the department
Unique identifier for each activity type
ID of the official engaging in the activity
Duration of the activity in minutes
Notes or details about the activity
Outcome or result of the activity
Location where the activity took place
